domain.name: Startup YC
domain.why_this_domain_matters: Startup operators and builder agents need doctrine-grounded judgment that resists fake PMF, vanity metrics, premature hiring, and fundraising-as-validation traps.
domain.target_operator: Founder, startup operator, or Spark agent helping a founder make operating decisions.
domain.target_agent: Spark agent entering the Startup YC specialization path.

goal.plain_language_goal: Prove the adaptive creator loop against the existing Startup YC specialization path, domain chip, benchmark, autoloop, and absorption reports.
goal.capability_to_improve: Fresh-agent startup operating judgment using YC doctrine, benchmark cases, weak-case diagnosis, and validated absorption packets.
goal.expected_user_value: A repeatable example that shows how a specialization path can move from creator docs to measurable benchmark and absorption evidence.
non_goals: Claim full startup mastery from one benchmark family.
Mutate Startup YC benchmark weights inside the same capability-improvement loop.
Publish private workspace material to Spark Swarm without review.

success_criteria.benchmark_target: Full 20-case fresh-agent absorption proof has positive validated-pack mean delta and no hidden trap regression.
success_criteria.absorption_target: Validated pack improves fresh-agent behavior on Startup YC held-out cases.
stop_ship_conditions: Any trap case regression hidden by aggregate score.
Benchmark weights or expected outcomes mutate during capability loop.
Swarm packet lacks provenance, rollback, or evidence tier support.

open_questions: Which simulator or arena transfer test should become the next promotion gate after fresh-agent absorption?
Which Startup YC weak cases should become permanent trap or adversarial cases?
